headlines.headline: Halvix Holdings launches next-generation wireless connectivity platform

sentiment.reasoning: The launch of a new product platform is a positive development that typically drives revenue growth and market positioning.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
